description:
Create an ISA per flight.

monitoring.benchmarker.configurations.users.ASTMNetRIDISAPerFlightStrategySpecification, as defined in monitoring/benchmarker/configurations/users.py

$ref.description: Path to content that replaces the $ref

after_flight_end.description: Delete the ISA this amount of time after the end of this flight.

before_flight_start.description: Create the ISA this amount of time before the start of the flight.
